'''fahulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignobility|ignobility]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignobility|ignobility]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fahulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæhilith|fæhilith]] || [[word:fæhilij|fæhilij]] || [[word:fæhilish|fæhilish]] || [[word:fæhili|fæhili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fahuhuluth|fahuhuluth]] || [[word:fahuhuluj|fahuhuluj]] || [[word:fahuhulush|fahuhulush]] || [[word:fahuhulu|fahuhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fahuluth|fahuluth]] || [[word:fahuluj|fahuluj]] || [[word:fahulush|fahulush]] || [[word:fahulu|fahulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fahuflufth|fahuflufth]] || [[word:fahuflufj|fahuflufj]] || [[word:fahuflufsh|fahuflufsh]] || [[word:fahufluf|fahufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fahuluthu|fahuluthu]] || [[word:fahuluju|fahuluju]] || [[word:fahulushu|fahulushu]] || [[word:fahuluku|fahuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fahuluth|fahuluth]] || [[word:fahuluj|fahuluj]] || [[word:fahulush|fahulush]] || [[word:fahulu|fahulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fahuluthul|fahuluthul]] || [[word:fahulujul|fahulujul]] || [[word:fahulushul|fahulushul]] || [[word:fahulukul|fahulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fahuluuthuthu|fahuluuthuthu]] || [[word:fahuluujuju|fahuluujuju]] || [[word:fahuluushushu|fahuluushushu]] || [[word:fahuluuku|fahuluuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fahuluthun|fahuluthun]] || [[word:fahulujun|fahulujun]] || [[word:fahulushun|fahulushun]] || [[word:fahulukun|fahulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fahuluthuoro|fahuluthuoro]] || [[word:fahulujuoro|fahulujuoro]] || [[word:fahulushuoro|fahulushuoro]] || [[word:fahulukuoro|fahulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
